---
title: "VigieRAM — Antibiogramme cumulé"
format: pdf
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| echo: false
facility = "CHU Bouaké"
db_path = "data/db/vigieram.db"
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import sqlite3

conn = sqlite3.connect(db_path)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
rows = conn.execute(
    "SELECT organism, antibiotic, result FROM clinical_ast WHERE LOWER(facility_name) = LOWER(?)",
    (facility,)
).fetchall()
conn.close()

print(f"## Établissement : {facility}\n")
print(f"**{len(rows)} résultats enregistrés.**\n")
print("**Source : saisies cliniques propres à cet établissement uniquement — aucune donnée externe.**\n")

stats = {}
for r in rows:
    key = (r["organism"], r["antibiotic"])
    stats.setdefault(key, {"R": 0, "I": 0, "S": 0, "total": 0})
    stats[key][r["result"]] += 1
    stats[key]["total"] += 1

print("| Organisme | Antibiotique | R | I | S | % Résistance |")
print("|---|---|---|---|---|---|")
for (organism, antibiotic), s in stats.items():
    pct = round(100 * s["R"] / s["total"], 1)
    print(f"| {organism} | {antibiotic} | {s['R']} | {s['I']} | {s['S']} | {pct}% |")
```
